text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Another peaceful day at the academy thanks to
your efforts, Biko Pegasus!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...So you can't even take your own birthday off
when it comes to patrol. You're a true hero, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's right! No matter the occasion, I can't
afford to skip a single day! That's what makes
me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Gah, why do I have to join in...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, quit your whining and play along till we're
finished.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're the one who started this by being lazy
and telling Biko you'd get her "whatever she wanted" for
her birthday present.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
How was I supposed to know she'd make me play
make-believe heroes...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's not make-believe, Hero Brian! Hehe, on to the
pool now—move out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, "Hero." Our duty today is protecting
Biko's precious smile.
